title: ICAI Declares CA Final May 2026 Examination Results
content:
# ICAI Declares CA Final May 2026 Examination Results

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne aaj, June 18, 2026, ko CA Final May 2026 Examination ke results announce kar diye hain.

Here are the key details for all the aspiring Chartered Accountants:

*   **Result Declaration Date:** The results for the CA Final May 2026 examinations have been declared on June 18, 2026.
*   **How to Check Results:** Candidates can access their scorecards by visiting the official result portals and entering their Registration Number along with their Roll Number.
*   **Official Websites:** You can check your results on `icai.org`, `icaiexam.icai.org`, and specifically at `caresults.icai.org`.
*   **Examination Statistics:**
    *   A total of 87,497 candidates were admitted for the exam.
    *   In Group I, 54,606 candidates appeared, with a pass percentage of 12%.
    *   For Group II, 42,573 candidates appeared, achieving a pass percentage of 20.49%.
    *   For candidates who appeared in Both Groups, 23,776 appeared, and 14.07% passed.
*   **All India Rank 1:** This year, Noor Singla from Patiala secured All India Rank 1 with an impressive score of 499 marks (83.17%).

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://icai.org/post.html?post_id=19106)

*Published on: 18 June 2026*
